markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content, reporting, and the competitive AI brief.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Blogs Delivered:** Two new blogs (2k+ words) are live for feedback by EOW, with a decision needed on whether to shorten them.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [**KPIs for AI Search:** GrowthX will propose a foundational KPI for AI search (e.g., citation rate) and provide client benchmarks to set realistic goals.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [**Competitive Brief Updated:** The brief will be updated with competitors Base 44 and Adalo, who are showing aggressive market activity.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [**Technical Audit Underway:** The technical SEO and AI readiness audit is in progress, with a summary expected from GrowthX next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Blog Performance Data Request:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [To prioritize content refreshes and inform new ideation, GrowthX needs blog performance data from the last 6–12 months.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**Metrics needed (per page):**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
          - [Direct signups from a blog page.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
          - [Influenced signups (user visited blog within a 30-day window before signup).](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
          - [Secondary data: UTM click-through rates (CTRs) on signup buttons.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Owner:** Eunice Ahn (Bubble).](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [**New Content Delivery:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Two new blogs (2k+ words) were delivered for feedback by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**Feedback focus:** Voice, tone, and product messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [**Length decision:** GrowthX recommends shortening to \~2k words, as Bubble's high domain authority may allow for shorter, more concise content without hurting performance.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**Content Refresh Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Aida is addressing feedback on a refresh article.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**Key correction:** Replace "visual designer" with "visual development."](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
          - [**Rationale:** "Visual designer" targets an irrelevant keyword (per SEMrush) associated with AI image generators, not Bubble.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Length:** The article's length matches top-ranking competitors (e.g., Adobe), so shortening is not a high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### AI Search & Competitive Analysis

  - [**Competitive AI Brief:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [Bubble requested client benchmarks to set realistic expectations for AI search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**SERP to AI Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
          - [GrowthX's data (April 2024–present) shows inconsistent SERP-to-AIO migration, making trends hard to find.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
          - [**Only consistent sources:** Branded queries and specific phrases leading to forum posts.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
          - [**Action:** Erik will provide a breakout of these consistent queries.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**KPIs for AI Search:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
      - [Bubble's OKR is AI search performance, requiring a foundational KPI.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**Candidate:** Citation rate.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
          - [**Pro:** It's an "earned" metric, unlike inconsistent AIO reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
          - [**Con:** It's complex. Citations can come from deep pages (e.g., page 30), and platform defaults vary (e.g., Claude requires web search to be enabled).](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will consult GrowthX's VP of SEO for a recommendation and client benchmarks.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [**Competitor Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will add Base 44 and Adalo to the competitive brief, as both are showing aggressive market activity.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### Technical SEO & Reporting

  - [**Technical Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [The technical SEO and AI readiness audit is in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [**Timeline:** GrowthX team readout by EOW; Erik to deliver a summary to Bubble next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [**Context:** The audit will identify fixable issues, acknowledging some limitations are due to Bubble's product architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [**Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will provide the updated "Scrunch" AI search report as a weekly PDF, now that a baseline is established.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

      - [Record a Loom video to onboard Scott to the Notion workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [Add Base 44 and Adalo to the competitive brief.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [Consult GrowthX's VP of SEO for a recommended AI search KPI and client benchmarks.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
      - [Deliver the technical audit summary next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [Begin sending the weekly "Scrunch" AI search report as a PDF.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Eunice:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
      - [Pull blog performance data (direct/influenced signups, CTRs) for the last 6–12 months.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [**Bubble Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the two new blog posts by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/TZVW5dPgvQiyz1qddGXn4Qxg2omn_D9H?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
